plr_bowl_ra_fast_la_fm_other.row_predicate: ((("bowling_skill" = 'Right-arm fast' OR "bowling_skill" = 'Left-arm fast-medium') OR ("bowling_skill" IS NULL OR "bowling_skill" NOT IN ('Right-arm medium', 'Right-arm offbreak', 'Right-arm fast-medium', 'Slow left-arm orthodox', 'Right-arm medium-fast', 'Legbreak', 'Legbreak googly', 'Right-arm fast', 'Left-arm fast-medium'))) OR (rowid IN (16,27,34,59,71,89,106,126,140,175,177,181,196,219,228,246,249,250,266,268,290,322,323,356,358,362,374,391,400,414,424,449,467)))

vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where bowler > 293 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("runs_scored" IS NOT NULL AND "runs_scored" > 1 AND "runs_scored" <= 1) OR ("runs_scored" > 1 OR "runs_scored" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 1 < runs_scored <= 1 + rows where runs_scored > 1 or is NULL
rows where man_of_the_match > 208 or is NULL

predicate_sqls: ((("bowling_skill" = 'Right-arm fast' OR "bowling_skill" = 'Left-arm fast-medium') OR ("bowling_skill" IS NULL OR "bowling_skill" NOT IN ('Right-arm medium', 'Right-arm offbreak', 'Right-arm fast-medium', 'Slow left-arm orthodox', 'Right-arm medium-fast', 'Legbreak', 'Legbreak googly', 'Right-arm fast', 'Left-arm fast-medium'))) OR (rowid IN (16,27,34,59,71,89,106,126,140,175,177,181,196,219,228,246,249,250,266,268,290,322,323,356,358,362,374,391,400,414,424,449,467)))
base_predicate_sqls: (("bowling_skill" = 'Right-arm fast' OR "bowling_skill" = 'Left-arm fast-medium') OR ("bowling_skill" IS NULL OR "bowling_skill" NOT IN ('Right-arm medium', 'Right-arm offbreak', 'Right-arm fast-medium', 'Slow left-arm orthodox', 'Right-arm medium-fast', 'Legbreak', 'Legbreak googly', 'Right-arm fast', 'Left-arm fast-medium')))
fragment_roles: rows where bowling_skill = Right-arm fast-medium + rows where bowling_skill = Legbreak + rows where bowling_skill = Legbreak googly
rows where bowling_skill = Slow left-arm orthodox + rows where bowling_skill = Right-arm medium-fast

rows where bowling_skill = Right-arm fast + rows where bowling_skill = Left-arm fast-medium + rows where bowling_skill is NULL or not in {'Right-arm medium', 'Right-arm offbreak', 'Right-arm fast-medium', 'Slow left-arm orthodox', 'Right-arm medium-fast', 'Legbreak', 'Legbreak googly', 'Right-arm fast', 'Left-arm fast-medium'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
rows where team_id > 7 or is NULL
rows where player_out > 212 or is NULL

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
